Flat concept inventory:
- Medical Dialog System | papers: 4c5b4a8e31d3119c1e3b5753693ff283c9717218; 2ebf8821ac370023734e9e7d6981c97a7f8c3bc4; 302ee27524a717ddc21f332ca634b9211c6ec6aa; e14fdf566f9fe9e605e047e8688c75ad4277bc17; cb46b3f4ee9e7db653c681b5dbe7986fc33b5742; eeef2fde50e15e414d2b51914eaff0f4981bbe72; 89b781037ef18a5d684c5f078d89dfe164e3100f; decd5815701541ff97b8e1a7434148591af46dd9; dd9e4c436ef969fd406c20b4d75ce62ac3a47c62; dd99f5cb66b6243c24929ad6a5a6edde5d821b1e; b1667d09bf9224fdd472993a0254e917fbe8b4a9; 5fbe01c0f05f9212bc7d8c2a24e8664942581c7a; 53409e0575eef4e5640da3a3fdcf9c3623fd85c9; b3227a0fee9954ac59603b7fdb4603bdca83d259; be3b9a215c5607007d40bf979ae3473733204b03; 0b1e9b852c1efe7047f9340bd7cf21f3b66290b2; 84d80ca64c6918c8c0e169a019aae7ceefb6c258; e014af8ae8d7dbd3c1c908dfba334a6d2181b8e1; ca5409a7f6a4cd2a47862bc46b1d4f3117f3a070; c18d1c61eb5d0c82f460ee180b278fbee6594322; 3fecb6df989c51592cb1a1a737f259c5e3b0eab1; 616597b6c8cc3d24339d9f16bb4b195624046abe; 3528107576c2765d34cb7b3984c7b14aabcebcea; 903ad24a5e924086869f6f9f0ae2992ae2971048; bffe2951b1ec9ebde3677a7aadc8b91212a9fdfc; 7d12ded75ced27dfb1855860d4de444bc0f3e517; 638122c685a236281093b2f6a761f355d4a2d5a0; 6cf6a2cecb26a104d61bf24cba4674f579f90d69; 9929e732e938c9be0a4e431c7cb785ac03938ff6; 906f319a043a954f8aa300ef5319cbea7285777a; 3cd7e6a018a3d10dd5b33bef2006e477ea526fce; 682a1e4f242a84e6a6b71c61c35411a27fd84689; 04c31edb2a74e078dd4580a46a366dab79c1e7e0; b0f8223f10c73ebcbeb6690be72ba8798f10d5a7; a921f6c4ebdb66945e76c51f42d5db6981a8e645; 1a308d3793363f47eae2ca1429e3078a01bb5e26; 3cc19d0e2df1af11a7a62da6533f70865a42ca11; 1dd1040691c26877639bb646413610f6915869ae; 3b821dbfa024027d8c009d8854c958c0e470837a; f9a19688c5c1cfd278b919c07da1fdb138fe38ca; 54738ed18575f40e9ff3ad0181aaccc527fc4f95; 2ad565fb0ce9cda15a9e5ce37b5678ec09b134b9; 99267305914a44ad6d626b7a6406fd0079b5508d; 17f2e1534727f84ab6c053d709a0e0b097b18fa8; 23174d73d44dcb436efb3cd4fd857a41a3c6de9e; c6304247f04870393d56579cdd5e093a25c121ee; df24c0f317fc73b893c852a3fce9536ba8607dfa; e2a2818ec251d947acd9c74c2040337e656946bc; 84bab90970575f07eb2380453b51191f3aff6fcd; 2a681dac0d4c2a36c4d3f61eb44c0ed7bf2c01cb; 99559d3d32042d7fe34153e167d5c8f40a83fcca; cff26bda86237d113ed01c812ad8bedd0afbe070; bde9da9a39a065588d7f4573936731510d6f4f29; 6052486bc9144dc1730c12bf35323af3792a1fd0; ea72fb2a0d340f9d14fbcf300cd5f5fbbe1050bb; 44d16a076c00ecada3d425203377e4ec951c4ed0; 5ef821267fa68d3231ed8135ff8ec09f25bb1398; ff5f0c5b6905a8c4b361a625b450e9ab417fa854; 420d6754315ac5db8a040386245cd15b9fe5b459; - System Categories | papers: 4c5b4a8e31d3119c1e3b5753693ff283c9717218; 2ebf8821ac370023734e9e7d6981c97a7f8c3bc4; 302ee27524a717ddc21f332ca634b9211c6ec6aa; e14fdf566f9fe9e605e047e8688c75ad4277bc17; cb46b3f4ee9e7db653c681b5dbe7986fc33b5742; eeef2fde50e15e414d2b51914eaff0f4981bbe72; 89b781037ef18a5d684c5f078d89dfe164e3100f; decd5815701541ff97b8e1a7434148591af46dd9; dd9e4c436ef969fd406c20b4d75ce62ac3a47c62; dd99f5cb66b6243c24929ad6a5a6edde5d821b1e; b1667d09bf9224fdd472993a0254e917fbe8b4a9; 5fbe01c0f05f9212bc7d8c2a24e8664942581c7a; 53409e0575eef4e5640da3a3fdcf9c3623fd85c9; b3227a0fee9954ac59603b7fdb4603bdca83d259; be3b9a215c5607007d40bf979ae3473733204b03; 0b1e9b852c1efe7047f9340bd7cf21f3b66290b2; 84d80ca64c6918c8c0e169a019aae7ceefb6c258; e014af8ae8d7dbd3c1c908dfba334a6d2181b8e1; ca5409a7f6a4cd2a47862bc46b1d4f3117f3a070; feb120cb4774fe93f020aafc5fa426aa6c8ab036; 5bd3b4ee705728f5a01fea7f80edf11344ae6e50; 7666cdb59b3cf97710d5cd57b79544674dd28150; 23144960a4fab87d7ebe260c252909428c27c3a9; b2550996566f2744fe52f8e9a423500f4670f89b; c18d1c61eb5d0c82f460ee180b278fbee6594322; 3fecb6df989c51592cb1a1a737f259c5e3b0eab1; 616597b6c8cc3d24339d9f16bb4b195624046abe; 3528107576c2765d34cb7b3984c7b14aabcebcea

- LLM-based Methods | papers: 99559d3d32042d7fe34153e167d5c8f40a83fcca; cff26bda86237d113ed01c812ad8bedd0afbe070; bde9da9a39a065588d7f4573936731510d6f4f29; 6052486bc9144dc1730c12bf35323af3792a1fd0; ea72fb2a0d340f9d14fbcf300cd5f5fbbe1050bb; 44d16a076c00ecada3d425203377e4ec951c4ed0; 5ef821267fa68d3231ed8135ff8ec09f25bb1398; ff5f0c5b6905a8c4b361a625b450e9ab417fa854; 420d6754315ac5db8a040386245cd15b9fe5b459; 61b0f5cfd4f951632435707948201474e16e835b; 021e6c5892347287182b405228fb22923691e3f0; 302ee27524a717ddc21f332ca634b9211c6ec6aa; bce55193d9a887ad00774a9134df08cd521a85ae; a50d4fd8f584276c0fd8560255884edd57aa926e; 8e6c4425e48b09d64827c64d8de0008f41f9be54; c9dff8253b2e776abf363d0a4836abcaf64ee327; 5459cab5dcf3c65c6b4f63b3d9f1e376f722bbcb
- Prompting LLMs | papers: 99559d3d32042d7fe34153e167d5c8f40a83fcca; cff26bda86237d113ed01c812ad8bedd0afbe070; bde9da9a39a065588d7f4573936731510d6f4f29; 6052486bc9144dc1730c12bf35323af3792a1fd0; ea72fb2a0d340f9d14fbcf300cd5f5fbbe1050bb; 44d16a076c00ecada3d425203377e4ec951c4ed0; 5ef821267fa68d3231ed8135ff8ec09f25bb1398
- Fine-tuning LLMs | papers: ff5f0c5b6905a8c4b361a625b450e9ab417fa854; 420d6754315ac5db8a040386245cd15b9fe5b459; 61b0f5cfd4f951632435707948201474e16e835b; 021e6c5892347287182b405228fb22923691e3f0; 302ee27524a717ddc21f332ca634b9211c6ec6aa; bce55193d9a887ad00774a9134df08cd521a85ae; a50d4fd8f584276c0fd8560255884edd57aa926e; 8e6c4425e48b09d64827c64d8de0008f41f9be54; c9dff8253b2e776abf363d0a4836abcaf64ee327; 5459cab5dcf3c65c6b4f63b3d9f1e376f722bbcb
- Evaluation | papers: 651e5bcc14f14605a879303e97572a27ea8c7956; 60b05f32c32519a809f21642ef1eb3eaf3848008; 15031e6a94f9d6d19f74740c224a5523ec64d975; d7da009f457917aa381619facfa5ffae9329a6e9; 05d1ce1d3f42cc466edc54f88162144a119433a3; 3528107576c2765d34cb7b3984c7b14aabcebcea; c189ee5794fc966a637154478d985d92da040306; 9c800a101fdbc95d76494e74cfec4f533bc1adab; 682a1e4f242a84e6a6b71c61c35411a27fd84689; 3b821dbfa024027d8c009d8854c958c0e470837a; e14fdf566f9fe9e605e047e8688c75ad4277bc17; 57fd722e2bbfffdb5b36a12ded59a303dbad95c5; 1a308d3793363f47eae2ca1429e3078a01bb5e26
- Evaluation Metrics | papers: 651e5bcc14f14605a879303e97572a27ea8c7956; 60b05f32c32519a809f21642ef1eb3eaf3848008; 15031e6a94f9d6d19f74740c224a5523ec64d975; d7da009f457917aa381619facfa5ffae9329a6e9; 05d1ce1d3f42cc466edc54f88162144a119433a3; 3528107576c2765d34cb7b3984c7b14aabcebcea
- Datasets | papers: c189ee5794fc966a637154478d985d92da040306; 9c800a101fdbc95d76494e74cfec4f533bc1adab; 682a1e4f242a84e6a6b71c61c35411a27fd84689; 15031e6a94f9d6d19f74740c224a5523ec64d975; 3528107576c2765d34cb7b3984c7b14aabcebcea; 3b821dbfa024027d8c009d8854c958c0e470837a; e14fdf566f9fe9e605e047e8688c75ad4277bc17; 57fd722e2bbfffdb5b36a12ded59a303dbad95c5; 1a308d3793363f47eae2ca1429e3078a01bb5e26
- Grand Challenges | papers: 5be5619fc22300ef356ec4ef729d567ce7116c57; 1e909e2a8cdacdcdff125ebcc566f37cb869a1c8; 4f63c5a89c7299a864c6c48aa1844fb0fe8c9437; 6887f052c78f016fbf9cbb0c4f887e5c14069651; 99559d3d32042d7fe34153e167d5c8f40a83fcca; 44d16a076c00ecada3d425203377e4ec951c4ed0; 5ef821267fa68d3231ed8135ff8ec09f25bb1398
